description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named sw that triggers on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job strategy to run on multiple operating systems (Windows, Ubuntu 20.04, macOS latest, and macOS 11.0) with a checkout step, a custom action from egorpugin/sw-action, and then install flex and bison depending on the OS. Build the project using ./sw -static build with OS-specific configurations, and finally upload the .sw/out artifact.
